a.label: active chart group G_act = S_3
a.standard_term: local chart-permutation group S_3 acting on the three surface roles

b.label: active-recharting invariant / local DBP invariant
b.standard_term: S3-equivariant scalar (invariant function) on jet space that is constant on group orbits

evidence.label: Active Recharting Orbit Theorem (thm:orbit)
evidence.summary: Let $\pi_r:X_r\to X_r/S_3$ be the set-orbit map. Then $\phi:X_r\to Y$ is an order-$r$ active-recharting invariant if and only if there is a unique $\bar\phi:X_r/S_3\to Y$ satisfying \[ \phi=\bar\phi\circ\pi_r. \] The sam

evidence.label: active-recharting invariant
evidence.summary: A function $\phi:X_r\to Y$ is an order-$r$ active-recharting invariant if \[ \phi(\mathcal T_\sigma\xi)=\phi(\xi) \] for every $\sigma\in S_3$ wherever both sides are defined.
